case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. FLORIBERTO ESCALANTE SERRANO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT FLORIBERTO ESCALANTE SERRANO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $887.30 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, FLORIBERTO ESCALANTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE: FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, FLORIBERTO ESCALANTE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $65.00) SERVED OCT-13-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SERRANO, FLORIBERTO ESCALANTE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SERRANO, FLORIBERTO ESCALANTE $887.30 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,002.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
